_comment: This is the SCHEMA for ccc's own config (~/.config/ccc/config.json), NOT something this repo writes. Shown here so you understand the multi-session/multi-group data model this orchestrator reads. bot_token & group_id are set by `ccc setup <token>`. The `sessions` map is what THIS repo's orchestrator reads to route messages.
_set_with: ccc setup <BOT_TOKEN>   then   ccc setgroup   (for forum topics)

session-a._note_group_id: OPTIONAL per-session group. If absent, falls back to top-level group_id. This is what enables 1 bot -> N groups (multi-user).

session-b._note: Different group_id => this session lives in a DIFFERENT Telegram group.
